sessions.title: Morning Stillness
sessions.subtitle: Ideal for falling back asleep after waking in the night, or for meeting the morning gently.
sessions.description: Ideal for falling back asleep after waking in the night, or for meeting the morning gently. Best played in a quiet room while your breathing and body gradually soften.

sessions.title: Sleep Release
sessions.subtitle: Loosen the weight of the day and let sleep come back naturally.
sessions.description: Loosen the weight of the day and let sleep come back naturally. Best played in a quiet room while your breathing and body gradually soften.

sessions.title: Emotional Ease
sessions.subtitle: Let emotion and breath slow down together as your mind returns to the body.
sessions.description: Let emotion and breath slow down together as your mind returns to the body. Best played in a quiet room while your breathing and body gradually soften.

sessions.title: Night Rest
sessions.subtitle: A gentle guided meditation to help your body relax and your mind soften into sleep.
